summary: Frontend-only test of Client360View 4 new embedded tabs (Budget, Goals, Investments-view, Tax). All 14 tab triggers present and functional. Each new tab correctly embeds the corresponding Simple* component (SimpleBudget, SimpleGoals, SimpleInvestments, SimpleTax) and renders Thompson family data sourced from CLIENT_DATA (via CLIENT_DATA.client_1 alias). Regression passes for Retirement (RetirementWorkshop renders) and Profile & Inputs tabs.

issues: Recharts console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' — chart container inside SimpleInvestments does not receive a non-zero width/height on first render of tab. Not a blocker but visible in console twice; consider min-width/min-height on ResponsiveContainer.

Header shows 'Total Wealth $1.61M' (from DEMO_CLIENT_DATA.client_1) while embedded Simple* components show HNW-level data (~$11.7M portfolio, $485k income) from CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family. Two parallel mock sources for the same client produce inconsistent numbers visible to the adviser. Consider unifying to a single source of truth.

action_items: (Optional) Unify DEMO_CLIENT_DATA in Client360View.jsx with CLIENT_DATA in /app/frontend/src/data/clientData.js to eliminate the $1.61M vs $11.7M discrepancy between the header and embedded Simple* components.
(Optional) Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height warning in SimpleInvestments when rendered inside hidden-then-activated Radix TabsContent.
critical_code_review_comments: Client360View.jsx is very large (>1200 lines). Consider extracting each tab's content into separate components for maintainability.

Two separate mock datasets (DEMO_CLIENT_DATA in Client360View.jsx and CLIENT_DATA in data/clientData.js) hold overlapping client info — source-of-truth risk; values already diverge (wealth totals, income, household counts).
TabsList uses overflow-x-auto — works, but with 14 tabs on mid-width screens this scrolls horizontally; acceptable but worth UX review.
seed_data_creation: None — used localStorage: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'client_1',name:'Thompson Family'}
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 tabs on /client-360 verified. New tabs Budget/Goals/Investments-view/Tax correctly render Simple* components with Thompson data from CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family. Minor console warning from recharts in investments-view tab (non-blocking). Two data sources exist for the same client (DEMO_CLIENT_DATA in Client360View.jsx vs CLIENT_DATA in data/clientData.js) — numbers differ between header and embedded components.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found that require RCA.
